DEFENDANT LINGSCH REALTY IS PRESENT, APPEARING IS NATALIE DREES. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MURLENE J RANDLE; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FRIEDMAN, THEO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LINGSCH REALTY $100.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $100.00, REIMBURSE $50 FOR CLEANING EXHAUST FAN IN BATHROOM, $50 CLEAN BACK LEFT BEDROOM LIGHT FIXTURE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
